title: Enterprise Microservices Migration
description: Led the architectural overhaul of a legacy monolith into a modern Next.js ecosystem.
challenges: Faced significant technical debt and performance bottlenecks in the legacy system.
solutions: Implemented a modular microservices architecture with Next.js and optimized data fetching.
impact: Improved overall system performance by 40% and reduced deployment times.

title: Real-time AI Insights Dashboard
description: Built a real-time data visualization platform for AI-driven analytics.
challenges: Handling high-frequency data streams without UI lag.
solutions: Utilized Socket.io for real-time communication and D3.js for efficient rendering.
impact: Enabled stakeholders to make data-driven decisions with sub-second latency.

title: High-Traffic E-commerce Core
description: Developed and optimized core features for a global e-commerce platform.
challenges: Slow database queries impacting user conversion rates.
solutions: Refactored PostgreSQL queries and implemented Redis caching layers.
impact: Reduced page load times by 25% and increased checkout completion by 15%.

title: Responsive UX Collection
description: Delivered high-performance responsive interfaces for diverse client projects.
challenges: Ensuring consistent behavior across fragmented mobile browsers.
solutions: Adopted a mobile-first CSS approach and semantic HTML5.
impact: Improved client satisfaction scores and mobile engagement metrics.

title: Scalable Serverless Infrastructure
description: Architected serverless backends to handle bursty traffic patterns.
challenges: Cold start issues and managing complex serverless deployments.
solutions: Leveraged AWS Lambda and API Gateway with automated Vercel deployments.
impact: Achieved 99.9% uptime while reducing infrastructure costs by 30%.
